content: Customers may request a full refund within 30 days of purchase for any reason. After 30 days and up to 90 days, a store credit equal to the purchase price is offered. No returns are accepted after 90 days. To process a refund: verify the customer's order number and purchase date, confirm the item is eligible, issue the refund to the original payment method within 5–7 business days, and send a confirmation email. If the item is defective, the 30-day limit is waived and a replacement is offered first. Escalate to a supervisor if the refund value exceeds $500.

Customers who cannot log in should first be directed to the self-service password reset link on the login page, which sends a reset link to their registered email. If they no longer have access to that email, verify their identity by asking for their full name, account username, and the answer to their security question. Once identity is verified, update the registered email in the system and send a new reset link. Do not share or read back any existing passwords. Log all identity verification steps for compliance. If identity cannot be verified after two attempts, escalate to the security team.

After an order ships, customers receive a tracking number via email within 24 hours. Standard delivery takes 5–7 business days; express delivery takes 1–2 business days. If a customer has not received their tracking number after 24 hours, check the order status in the system. If the order has shipped but no tracking email was sent, resend the tracking email manually. If the order has not shipped, check for warehouse processing delays and provide an estimated ship date. If the order is more than 3 days past the estimated ship date, escalate to the fulfilment team and offer the customer a 10% discount on their next order as a goodwill gesture.
